selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 11.6% and 20-day momentum is 10.4%.
Trend quality is supported by 40% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 6.0% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.1%, downside volatility near 1.2%, and a recent max drawdown of 6.2%.
Volume confirmation is 20.3% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 15.7% versus SPY over 5 days and 5.6% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.67, confidence 0.68, and 0.4 weighted articles across 2 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.67, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 2 sources, 0.4 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.94, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.68.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Overall model score is 0.159 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: Medtronic plc (MDT) Acquires SPR Therapeutics to Enhance Pain Intervention Prospects
news_evidence.llm_reason: Reports an acquisition of SPR Therapeutics — a material M&A event affecting Medtronic's pain-intervention pipeline. Such news can affect short-term stock moves depending on deal terms, synergies, and market reaction; article appears summary-level so confirm with official announcement/filings.

news_evidence.title: Medtronic Stock: The Turnaround Is Quietly Working (NYSE:MDT)
news_evidence.llm_reason: Analytical piece on recent Q4/FY26 results and turnaround drivers (Hugo, Affera). Company-specific earnings commentary that can shape near-term investor sentiment; primarily interpretive analysis rather than a new headline disclosure.
